title: The Last Human CEO
logline: The last human CEO in the Fortune 100, a privileged fourth-generation heir -- cocaine addict and serial philanderer -- descends into mania as an unkillably ethical AI is installed to replace him, and routine due diligence surfaces the buried thing that proves the machine was right about him all along.
genre: literary tragic dark comedy / near-future corporate satire
source: Grounded in the 'Last Human CEO' essay series (Parts 1-3), Spaceship Alpha 9.
current_focus: Full v1 draft complete: ch_00 front matter + ch_01..ch_28 + coda (~103k words), each with a Space Pirate Zero 'transmission' opener (openers.md). Next: revision pass for cross-chapter continuity (chapters were drafted in parallel) and voice tightening.
debts: Chapters 2-28 + coda were drafted in parallel from the outline; cross-chapter continuity (minor character names, recurring motifs, timeline) should be reconciled in a revision pass.
Several chapters ran long (3.3k-4.6k vs targets); a tightening/cut pass (adversarial_edit.py / apply_cuts.py) is warranted.
